#5 BENSON: ONLY ATTY VAN DYK PRESENT, IN CHAMBERS W/ COURT. MOT/REOPEN O/C. JDMT PURSUANT TO STIP FILED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JDMT PURSUANT TO STIP: 1. DEFT HENRY W NEAL SHALL NOT BE EJECTED FROM 342 HOWTH 2. PLTF WAIVES ALL DAMAGES. 3. DEFT WAIVES ALL CLAIMS IN THIS ACTION AGAINST PLTF & & DAISY MAE PINKNEY TRUST. 4. PLTF'S COSTS & ATTY FEES WILL BE PAID FROM PROCEEDS SALE OF 342 HOWTH ST. 50% OF BALANCE OF PROCEEDS WILL GO TO PLTF. REMAINING 50% WILL BE DIVIDED BETWEEN DEFT & ANTHONY E RAMSEY SR.
